description: Evaluates identity management service maturity—identity stores, subject and object profiles, provisioning and deprovisioning, third-party vendor identity lifecycle, break glass, and SOC logging of identity lifecycle changes.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: An identity management service exists and is reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Identity management KPIs and KRIs are documented and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Identity Store
capabilities.description: A centralized identity store manages enterprise and third-party users with automation, configuration review, enforcement point integration, and SCIM automation.
evaluation_focus: Enforcement point integration with identity store

capabilities.name: Identity store custodians
capabilities.description: Separate roles manage the identity store and the identities themselves.
evaluation_focus: Separate roles for identity store and identity management

capabilities.name: Subject Profiles
capabilities.description: Subject profiles are created via a formalized process considering attributes like environment and context, scoped appropriately, automated, reviewed, and used in policy creation.
evaluation_focus: Enforcement points use subject profiles in policy

capabilities.name: Object Profiles
capabilities.description: Object profiles are created via a formalized process considering attributes like environment and context, scoped appropriately, automated, reviewed, and used in policy creation.
evaluation_focus: Enforcement points use object profiles in policy

capabilities.name: Identity Provisioning
capabilities.description: Identity provisioning based on profiles is formalized, automated, and reviewed for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Identity Deprovisioning
capabilities.description: Identity deprovisioning based on triggers is formalized, automated, and reviewed for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Third Party Vendor Identity provisioning
capabilities.description: Third-party identity provisioning is documented, automated from profile, and reviewed for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Third Party Vendor Identity de-provisioning
capabilities.description: Third-party identity deprovisioning is documented, automated from triggers, and reviewed for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Emergency Break Glass
capabilities.description: An emergency break glass process exists when the identity store is unreachable and is reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Identity life cycle logging
capabilities.description: Identity management and lifecycle changes are logged securely to the SOC, including dynamic profile changes.
evaluation_focus: Documented identity lifecycle logging to SOC
Secure identity lifecycle logging to SOC
Dynamic identity profile changes to SOC

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
